ValidationRule.description: Lead cannot be converted with Eficode Subsidiary value Other. -21122023 Jasmin/Ceili
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (AND( ISPICKVAL( Status , "Converted to an Account"), IsConverted = true, ISPICKVAL( CV_Subsidiary__c , "Other") )) && $Setup.rh2__PS_Settings__c.rh2__Run_Validation_Rule__c
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must choose an Eficode Subsidiary in order to convert this Lead
